title: Module 1
content:
DC Ammeter- Multirange Ammeter – The Aryton Shunt or Universal Shunt
– Requirements of shunt- Extending the range of Ammeter- RF
Ammeter(Thermocouple
DC Voltmeter - Multirange Voltmeter - Extending the range of Voltmeter –
Transistor Voltmeter – Chopper type DC Voltmeter- True RMS voltmeter
Wattmeter – Construction and Theory of Electrodynamic Wattmeter,
Ferrodynamic Wattmeter and Low Power factor Wattmeter

title: Module 2
content:
Transformers: Principle of Operation – EMF Equation – Phasor diagram –
Equivalent Circuit – Basic principle of auto transformer
DC Generator: Principle of Operation – EMF Equation- Armature reaction –
Commutation
DC Motor: Principle of Operation – Back EMF – Speed equation –
Torques- Performance characteristics.

title: Module 3
content:
Stepper Motor: Constructional features, principle of operation, types
Switched Reluctance Motor - Principle of Operation, Constructional
features, Torque equation
Permanent Magnet Brushless DC Motor: Difference between mechanical
and electronic commutators-Construction and principle of PMBL DC Motor,
Torque and E.M.F equation, Torque-speed characteristics

title: Module 4
content:
Measurement and Testing Instruments: Network Analyzers - Logic
Analyzers.
Power and Energy Instruments: Power Quality Analyzers, Smart Energy
Meters.
